Container.Name: LibrAIry
Container.Overview: LibrAIry is a privacy-first, AI-assisted file organizer for NAS libraries. Drop files into an inbox, review proposed destinations, then commit approved moves. It never deletes files, never overwrites destinations, and treats the existing library as read-only.
Container.Description: Self-hosted file organization with FastAPI web review, SQLite, local-first AI, reversible quarantine, and safe commit plans.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Port for the LibrAIry web portal.

Config.Name: Inbox Path
Config.Description: Drop messy files here. LibrAIry scans this path.

Config.Name: Library Path
Config.Description: Organized output. Existing files are indexed read-only and never modified.

Config.Name: Quarantine Path
Config.Description: Reversible duplicate/review storage. LibrAIry never deletes files.

Config.Name: Appdata Path
Config.Description: SQLite database, settings, thumbnails, and logs.

Config.Name: PUID
Config.Description: UID used for files created in mounted shares. UNRAID default nobody is 99.

Config.Name: PGID
Config.Description: GID used for files created in mounted shares. UNRAID default users is 100.

Config.Name: Ollama Host
Config.Description: LAN URL where Ollama is reachable. Leave default when Ollama runs on the Docker host.

Config.Name: Primary Ollama Model
Config.Description: Default local model. Use qwen3:4b for CPU hosts or qwen3:8b for stronger GPU hosts.

Config.Name: TMDB Key
Config.Description: Optional free TMDB API key for movie and TV metadata.

Config.Name: AcoustID Key
Config.Description: Optional free AcoustID key for audio fingerprint lookup.
